response:
To find the **characteristic polynomial** of a $ 3 \times 3 $ matrix, we use the formula:

$$
\text{Char}(A) = \det(A - \lambda I)
$$

Where $ A $ is the given matrix, and $ I $ is the identity matrix of the same size.

---

### Step 1: Write the matrix $ A $

$$
A = \begin{bmatrix}
\frac{189}{16} & -\frac{27}{4} & \frac{83}{8} \\
\frac{39}{8} & -\frac{43}{8} & -\frac{41}{16} \\
\frac{21}{16} & \frac{213}{16} & \frac{35}{8}
\end{bmatrix}
$$

---

### Step 2: Compute $ A - \lambda I $

$$
A - \lambda I = \begin{bmatrix}
\frac{189}{16} - \lambda & -\frac{27}{4} & \frac{83}{8} \\
\frac{39}{8} & -\frac{43}{8} - \lambda & -\frac{41}{16} \\
\frac{21}{16} & \frac{213}{16} & \frac{35}{8} - \lambda
\end{bmatrix}
$$

---

### Step 3: Compute the determinant of $ A - \lambda I $

$$
\det(A - \lambda I) = \begin{vmatrix}
\frac{189}{16} - \lambda & -\frac{27}{4} & \frac{83}{8} \\
\frac{39}{8} & -\frac{43}{8} - \lambda & -\frac{41}{16} \\
\frac{21}{16} & \frac{213}{16} & \frac{35}{8} - \lambda
\end{vmatrix}
$$

We will compute this determinant using cofactor expansion or row operations.
